findings.description: Primary human-readable markdown writeup. Specific, cited, calibrated.

source.description: Where the evidence came from — URL, file:line, log query, ticket ID.

summary.description: One-line summary of what the evidence shows.

excerpt.description: Optional verbatim quote from the source.

verdict.description: Populated when expect === 'incident' or the investigation reached a classification. Omit for general fact-finding.

writeup.description: Markdown body for the eventual bug ticket.

customer_summary.description: Markdown for the eventual customer-facing comment back on the original ticket.

caveats.description: What couldn't be verified or what data was missing. Be explicit.
